'''Chuck Bratz''' was a young [[Gender/Legends|boy]] and the older brother of [[Donni Bratz]]. On the ship ''[[Reasonable Doubt]]'', they were in the [[Kidz Arkade]]. Chuck was playing [[Wookiee Warpath]] for his fourth consecutive game, shutting his brother up as he pleaded for a try at the game. He was described as a [[God/Legends|god]] when he played the game, and he earned his younger brother's respect from that. He was completely oblivious to a [[Yoda/Legends|strange R2 unit]] who came up and stole his [[Fizzy-Bip|drink]].

==Appearances==
